name: kpneumo_hs11286_integron_class1_In4_reference
description: Class 1 integron In4 — reference card. Class 1 integrons consist of a 5' conserved sequence (5'CS: intI1, attI1, Pc) and a 3' CS (qacEdelta1-sul1), with a variable gene-cassette array between them. In1..In12 are the founding members of the class 1 integron numbering. Variable cassettes include aacA, aadA, dfrA, blaOXA, blaIMP, blaVIM, etc.
